name: Keowee Key Golf And Country Club
description: Keowee Key Golf And Country Club is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Salem, SC. There are 8 outdoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility. The courts are private.
fees: Private — Only residents and their guests can play on the courts. Guests are charged a minimum fee.

name: Shaver Community Center
description: Come play pickleball at Shaver Community Center in Seneca, SC! There are 6 indoor wood courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. Players have access to food, restrooms, and water. You can reserve the courts. The courts are free.

name: South Cove County Park
description: South Cove County Park is a place to play pickleball in Seneca, SC. There are 8 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Players have access to water, lights, and restrooms.
open_play_schedule: Usually people show here at 8 o’clock to 9 o’clock in the morning until roughly around noon to 1 o’clock

name: SpindleTree Racquet Club
description: SpindleTree Racquet Club is a place to play pickleball in Seneca, SC. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like lights. A membership is required to play.

name: Thousand Trails - Carolina Landings
description: Thousand Trails - Carolina Landings is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Fair Play, SC. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. A membership is required to play.

name: Walhalla City Park
description: Come play pickleball at Walhalla City Park in Walhalla, SC! There are 3 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. You can’t reserve the courts. The courts are free.
